meta.title: Sentryo: Lessons Learned Through Our OT Security Journey
meta.description: Bob Foley presents on the S4x19 Sponsor Stage. He introduces the company and product, and then spends most of the 25 minute session describing situations they have run into deploying ICS detection technology and lessons learned.
